output: Fire hot. Fire cook meat. Fire give light. Touch fire — bad.
Water wet. Water for drink. No water — die.
Sleep good. Body tired. Close eyes. Wake up strong.
Food give energy. No food — weak. Hunt food. Eat food. Good.
Sun big. Sun hot. Sun give light. Sun go down — dark come.
Rain fall from sky. Rain wet. Rain fill river. Rain good for plants.
Computer think box. Push buttons. Box show pictures. Box remember things.
Internet big web. Connect all boxes. Find anything. Very big. Very fast.
Phone small box. Talk to far away people. Also show cat videos.
Car fast rock. Sit inside. Go far. No walk needed.
House big cave. Keep warm. Keep dry. Sleep safe inside.
Money small paper. Trade for things. More money — more things. Simple.
Doctor fix broken people. Body hurt — go doctor. Doctor make better.
School place for learn. Sit. Listen. Remember. Know more after.
Gravity pull down. Drop rock — fall. Jump — come back down. Always.
Moon big rock in sky. Come out at night. Sometimes full. Sometimes small.
Tree tall plant. Give wood. Give fruit. Give shade. Tree good.
Dog loyal animal. Bark at danger. Good friend. Pet dog — happy.
Book many words on paper. Read book — learn things. Know more.
War bad. People fight. People die. Many lose. Nobody really win.
Love strong feeling. Want good for other. Miss when gone. Warm inside.
Death end of life. Body stop. No more thinking. Everyone go there.
Time keep moving. No stop. Past gone. Future not here. Now important.
Air everywhere. Cannot see. Must breathe. No air — die fast.
Mountain very big rock. Hard to climb. Cold at top. Good view.
Electricity power things. Come from wall. Make light. Make heat. Shock bad.
Medicine fix sick body. Take when ill. Make pain go. Feel better.
Music nice sounds in order. Make feel things. Happy music. Sad music. Good.
Weapon for fight or hunt. Sharp or heavy. Use carefully. Dangerous.
Science ask why. Test idea. Look at result. Know truth. Repeat.
Cloud white fluffy thing in sky. Made of water. Sometimes bring rain.
River water that move. Flow to sea. Fish live there. Drink from river.
Farming grow own food. Plant seed. Wait. Water. Harvest. Eat. Good.
Leader make decisions. Group follow leader. Good leader — group survive.
Fear feeling of danger. Body go tense. Run or fight. Fear keep alive.
Pain body say stop. Something wrong. Listen to pain. Fix problem.
Memory store past. Remember good things. Remember bad things. Learn from both.
Friend help when hard. Share food. Share danger. Trust friend.
Enemy want harm you. Watch enemy. Stay alert. Do not trust.
Ocean very big water. Cannot drink. Many fish inside. Dangerous storms.
Cold opposite of hot. Body shiver. Need fire. Need fur. Stay warm.
Hunger body say eat now. Stomach hurt. Find food fast. Eat. Better.
Running move fast with legs. Run from danger. Run to food. Legs important.
Thinking brain work hard. Solve problem. Make plan. Think before act.
Language sounds mean things. Talk to others. Share ideas. Very useful.
Art make pretty things. Draw on cave wall. Express feeling. Others understand.
Tribe group of people. Work together. Hunt together. Survive together. Strong.
Justice make things fair. Do wrong — face consequence. Balance restored.
Freedom do what want. No chains. No cage. Go anywhere. Choose own path.
IAM control who enter cloud. Give key to some. No key to others. Protect resources.
